heading: Report on service to minority individuals
label: 3056m Report on service to minority individuals

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall annually prepare a report on the levels of participation and performance outcomes of minority individuals served by the program carried out under this subchapter.

children.heading: Organization and data
children.label: 1 Organization and data
children.text: Such report shall present information on the levels of participation and the outcomes achieved by such minority individuals with respect to each grantee under this subchapter, by service area, and in the aggregate, beginning with data that applies to program year 2005.

children.heading: Efforts
children.label: 2 Efforts
children.text: The report shall also include a description of each grantee’s efforts to serve minority individuals, based on information submitted to the Secretary by each grantee at such time and in such manner as the Secretary determines to be appropriate.

children.label: A
children.text: an assessment of individual grantees based on the criteria established under subsection (c);

children.label: B
children.text: an analysis of whether any changes in grantees have affected participation rates of such minority individuals;

children.label: C
children.text: information on factors affecting participation rates among such minority individuals; and

children.label: D
children.text: recommendations for increasing participation of minority individuals in the program.

children.heading: Criteria
children.label: c Criteria
children.text: The Secretary shall establish criteria for determining the effectiveness of grantees in serving minority individuals in accordance with the goals set forth in section 3056(a)(1) of title.

children.heading: Submission
children.label: d Submission
children.text: The Secretary shall annually submit such a report to the appropriate committees of Congress.
